Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER following a rejection by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in cases where rejection occurs after pre-approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that contain at least one rejection prior to approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER compared to the total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in similar budget contexts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants where no budget owner approval is required
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to be done after resubmission following a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in high-frequency successful variants (e.g., frequency > 500)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases declared within two months after the trip versus those declared immediately after cost payment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Request Payment in domestic declaration cases versus pre-paid travel cost cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled without any rejection
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'", 'end': "activity == 'Payment Handled'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': "activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'"}"
